title: Disclosure of Terms and Conditions of Employment. The LMA shall,
content: 17 prior to the signing of the employment contract, inform the seafarers of their rights and 18 obligations, and disclose the full terms and conditions of employment, including CBAs, if 19 applicable. The LMA shall likewise ensure that the seafarer is provided with a copy of the 20 DMW-approved contract, to give the seafarer ample opportunity to examine the same. 21 22

metadata.source_file: [NOTICE TO PUBLIC] CLEAN DRAFT OF THE DMW SEABASED RULES.pdf
